info.title: Home Repair Video Analyser
info.description: Upload a home repair video; get a structured Gemini 2.5 Flash assessment.

get.description:
Return the status of optional features.

Frontend can use this to gracefully degrade (e.g., hide push-notification buttons
if push is disabled) without making extra API calls.

post.description: Submit 1–5 photographs of a home repair problem. The service assigns each image a triangulation role (Wide Shot, Close-up, Scale/Context …), preprocesses them for token efficiency, and returns a structured Gemini 2.5 Flash diagnosis.

get.description: Return public Supabase config needed for client-side OAuth (safe to expose).

post.description: Send a one-time magic-link / OTP to the given email address.
Exchange an email OTP token for a Supabase session (access_token).

Register a new account with email + password.

Supabase enforces one account per email across all providers — attempting
to register with an address already used by Google / magic-link returns a
clear error rather than creating a duplicate.

Send a password-reset email.  Always returns 202 to avoid leaking whether
an address is registered (email enumeration defence).
Exchange a recovery access_token for a new password and return a fresh session.

schema.title: Response Address Autocomplete Address Autocomplete Get

post.description: Submit a review for a contractor on a completed job.

get.description: Return all reviews for a contractor, newest first.
Return aggregated rating averages for a contractor (public, no auth).

post.description:
Generate (or regenerate) the RFP for a job.

Requires ``analysis_result`` to be stored on the job.  Call this after the
homeowner has answered any clarifying questions from the initial analysis.

The response includes:
- The full RFP document (scope, trade category, permit flags, etc.)
- A private cost estimate range in GBP pence
- Permit / planning considerations

The RFP and cost fields are also written back to the job row.

get.description:
Return contractors best matched to this job.

Ranking uses cosine similarity between the job's RFP text and each
contractor's stored profile embedding.  If no embeddings exist yet (new
platform with no contractors who have called ``/me/contractor/embed-profile``),
the endpoint falls back to a simple activity-category filter.

Response fields per contractor:
- All ``contractors`` table columns
- ``contractor_details``: nested details object (may be null)
- ``match_score``: float 0–1 from embedding similarity, or null for fallback rows

Query params:
- ``limit`` (int, default 10): max contractors to return

post.description:
Regenerate the embedding for the calling contractor's profile.

This should be called after any change to business details — the embedding
powers the semantic matching shown to homeowners when they request bids.

Response:
- ``profile_text``: the plain-text summary that was embedded
- ``embedding_dimensions``: 768 (confirms model version)

get.description:
Return the Stripe publishable key for frontend SDK initialisation.

The frontend should call this once on mount to get the key it needs to
load Stripe.js and render the Payment Element.

post.description:
Initiate escrow payment for an awarded job.

The job must be in 'awarded' status (a bid has been accepted).
Returns a Stripe client_secret — pass this to the Stripe Payment Element
on the frontend to collect and confirm the payment.

Response:
- client_secret:          for Stripe.js confirmPayment()
- provider_ref:           PaymentIntent ID (store for your records)
- amount_pence:           amount charged (from the accepted bid)
- currency:               always "gbp"
- stripe_publishable_key: convenience — same as GET /escrow/config

get.description:
Return current escrow status for a job.

Accessible to both the homeowner and the job's contractor.

Response:
- job_escrow_status:  current status on the jobs table
- transaction:        full escrow_transactions record (or null if not yet initiated)

post.description:
Release held funds to the contractor.

Can only be called by the homeowner when escrow_status is 'held'.
If the contractor has not linked a Stripe Connect account, payout_pending
will be true — the platform admin must complete the transfer manually.

Response:
- status:         "released"
- transfer_id:    Stripe Transfer ID (null if payout_pending)
- payout_pending: true if contractor has no connected Stripe account

Refund held funds to the homeowner.

Only valid while escrow_status is 'held'.  Once released, refunds must be
handled manually through the payment provider dashboard.

Response:
- status:    "refunded"
- refund_id: Stripe Refund ID

Start or resume Stripe Connect onboarding for a contractor.

Returns a single-use URL valid for ~5 minutes.  Redirect the contractor
to this URL immediately — do not cache it.

Response:
- onboarding_url:  redirect the contractor here
- account_id:      Stripe account ID (store for reference; also saved server-side)
- expires_at:      Unix timestamp when the link expires

get.description:
Return the contractor's Stripe Connect account status.

Response:
- connected:         false if no account linked yet
- charges_enabled:   true when the account can accept payments
- payouts_enabled:   true when the account can receive payouts
- details_submitted: true when onboarding form is complete
- account_id:        Stripe account ID (null if not connected)

post.description: Contractor submits an anonymous clarifying question on a job.

get.description:
List questions on a job.

- Job owner: sees all questions, contractor identity anonymised as "Contractor N".
- Contractor: sees only their own questions, identified as "You".

patch.description: Job owner answers a contractor's question.

get.description:
Return the VAPID application server public key.

The frontend passes this as the `applicationServerKey` when calling
PushManager.subscribe().  The key is not secret.

post.description:
Register a Web Push subscription for the authenticated user.

Upserts on (user_id, endpoint) — safe to call again after a page refresh
to keep the stored subscription fresh.

delete.description: Remove a push subscription endpoint for the authenticated user.

post.description:
Homeowner defines milestones for a job.

Can be called on jobs with status 'awarded' or 'in_progress'.
Existing milestones are not deleted — new ones are appended.

get.description:
List milestones with their photo evidence.

Accessible to the job owner and the job's accepted contractor.

post.description:
Accepted contractor submits photo evidence for a milestone.

Moves the milestone status from 'pending' or 'rejected' → 'submitted'.
Pass ?analyse=true to also run the TradePhotoAnalyzer and return an
AI-generated assessment alongside the saved photo record.

parameters.name: analyse

schema.description: Run AI analysis on the photo and include the result.
schema.title: Analyse

parameters.description: Run AI analysis on the photo and include the result.

patch.description:
Job owner approves or rejects a submitted milestone.

Only milestones in 'submitted' status can be actioned.
Approval sets status → 'approved' and records approved_at.
Rejection sets status → 'rejected'; the contractor can re-submit.

get.description: List all documents uploaded by the authenticated contractor (all statuses).

post.description:
Upload an official document. AI field extraction runs immediately.

On success the record is returned with status 'verified' (all required
fields extracted) or 'needs_review' (poor scan / wrong document type).

get.description:
List verified, non-expired documents for a contractor (public endpoint).

file_source is excluded to avoid returning raw document bytes to third parties.

delete.description: Soft-delete a document. The record is retained for audit purposes.

return_url.title: Return Url
return_url.description: URL Stripe redirects the contractor to after onboarding completes.

refresh_url.title: Refresh Url
refresh_url.description: URL Stripe redirects to if the onboarding link expires.

document_type.title: Document Type
document_type.description: One of: insurance, licence, certification, other

file_source.title: File Source
file_source.description: HTTPS URL or base64 data URI of the document image or scan.

role.title: Role
role.description: Triangulation role assigned to this image.

ImageFeedback.title: ImageFeedback
ImageFeedback.description: Quality assessment for a single submitted image.

milestones.title: Milestones
milestones.description: Ordered list of milestones to create for the job.

images.title: Images
images.description: 1–5 image sources. Each must be an HTTPS URL or a base64 data URI (data:image/<type>;base64,<data>). Supported formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP.

description.title: Description
description.description: Brief customer description of the problem (10–1000 characters).

trade_category.title: Trade Category
trade_category.description: Optional trade hint. Must be one of: ['damp', 'electrical', 'general', 'plumbing', 'roofing', 'structural']. Omit if unknown.

likely_issue.title: Likely Issue
likely_issue.description: Concise one-sentence diagnosis. Set to 'INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE' when the images do not provide enough detail for a confident diagnosis.

urgency_score.title: Urgency Score
urgency_score.description: 1 = cosmetic / can wait, 10 = immediate safety risk.

required_tools.title: Required Tools
required_tools.description: Specific tools needed for the repair.

estimated_parts.title: Estimated Parts
estimated_parts.description: Parts or materials identified (with sizes/specs where visible).

image_feedback.title: Image Feedback
image_feedback.description: Per-image quality flags from the preprocessing stage.

token_usage_estimate.description: Actual Gemini token counts — zero when the API does not return them.

image_source.title: Image Source
image_source.description: HTTPS URL or base64 data URI of the completion photo.

answer.title: Answer
answer.description: Homeowner's answer to the contractor's question.

question.title: Question
question.description: Clarifying question about the job (10–1 000 characters).

clarification_answers.title: Clarification Answers
clarification_answers.description: Answers to the clarifying_questions returned by the analysis endpoint. Keys are the questions (verbatim), values are the homeowner's answers.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Reason for the refund (dispute, cancellation, etc.).

note.title: Note
note.description: Optional note from the homeowner approving the work.

contractor_id.title: Contractor Id
contractor_id.description: UUID of the contractor being reviewed

private_feedback.title: Private Feedback
private_feedback.description: Admin-only. Written to DB but never returned to callers.

TokenUsage.title: TokenUsage
TokenUsage.description: Actual token counts from Gemini — use to track cost efficiency.
